purpose: Standard questions to ask after every review cycle. These are the post-mortem rulebook — never skip these questions.

questions.question: How was the communication between implementer and reviewer?
questions.what_to_look_for: Did the fix items map give enough context? Were rejections clear enough to be accepted without argument? Did the reviewer waste time re-discovering things the implementer should have flagged?
questions.output: Communication quality score and specific gaps

questions.question: How long did it take? (rounds, time, tokens, tool calls)
questions.what_to_look_for: Compare against baseline. Round 1 cold start cost vs incremental rounds. Total tokens consumed. Is the cost justified by the quality improvement?
questions.output: Timing table (per round + total) and comparison to prior cycles

questions.question: What did you learn from this review cycle?
questions.what_to_look_for: New patterns discovered. Recurring blind spots. What the implementer missed that the reviewer caught. What the reviewer missed that should be added to the checklist.
questions.output: Lessons learned list with rule candidates

questions.question: Should the communication contract be updated?
questions.what_to_look_for: Did the fix items map format work? Did the reviewer's structured feedback have enough detail? Were rejection reasons actionable? Is there a new artifact type that would improve the next cycle?

questions.question: Should new rules be added to the component rulebook?
questions.what_to_look_for: Any finding that was a new pattern (not covered by existing rules). Any finding that was a recurring pattern (existing rule not strong enough).
questions.output: New rule proposals following rule-book-guide.json format

questions.question: Should the rule-book-guide itself be updated?
questions.what_to_look_for: Did the rule format work for the reviewers? Were DO/DONT examples actionable enough? Is the quality checklist complete?

questions.question: What is the convergence trend?
questions.what_to_look_for: Are we converging faster than prior cycles? What is the unresolved count trend? Are improvements being applied and acknowledged?
questions.output: Convergence data table with comparison to prior runs
